emails.subject: gas swap price
emails.body: gas swap price Charlie Steve, I work in the power structuring group and need your assistance in pricing a gas swap. The details are as follows: Jan 1, 2002 Dec 31, 2012 transco z6 priced at mid I'm sure I am missing some inputs since I am new to this. Please tell me what else I need to provide you. Could you please give me one price with basis included and one without basis. Thanks, Steve x3-7214

emails.subject: RE: gas swap price
emails.body: RE: gas swap price Steve, As of yesterday's curves, financial mid is 5.169 and physical mid is 5.311. The physical Index premium is at TranscoZ6 is ~.035 in summer and ~0.5 in winter. Let me know if you need anything else. Charlie To: Weldon, V. Charles; Curlee, Steven

emails.subject: RE: gas swap price
emails.body: Charlie thanks for the help. steve To: Jacobellis, Steve; Curlee, Steven
